zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto II von Bayern於1206年4月7日出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 凱拉海姆時，他的父親Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern32歲，母親Ludmilla von Böhmen36歲。他於1222年5月與Agnes von Braunschweig在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1253年11月29日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 藍書特享年47歲，埋葬在德國貝也奧培爾巴也爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto II von Bayern于1206年4月7日出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 凱拉海姆时，他的父亲Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern32岁，母亲Ludmilla von Böhmen36岁。他于1222年5月与Agnes von Braunschweig在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1253年11月29日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 藍書特享年47岁，埋葬在德国貝也奧培爾巴也爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bayern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German (and possibly also Dutch)   Bayer   or   Beyers  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare   Byers  .

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto II von Bayern was born on 7 April 1206, in Kelheim, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern, was 32 and his mother, Ludmilla von Böhmen, was 36. He married Agnes von Braunschweig in May 1222, in Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 November 1253, in Landshut, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 47, and was buried in Oberbayern, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto II von Bayern est né le 7 avril 1206, à Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ludmilla von Böhmen, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Agnes von Braunschweig en mai 1222, à Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1253, à Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Oberbayern, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto II von Bayern am 7. April 1206 in Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern 32 und seine Mutter Ludmilla von Böhmen 36. Er hat im Mai 1222 in Heiliges Römisches Reich Agnes von Braunschweig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. November 1253 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Oberbayern, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto II von Bayern è nato il il 7 aprile 1206 nel Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ludmilla von Böhmen, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Agnes von Braunschweig nel maggio 1222, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 novembre 1253, nel Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Oberbayern, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto II von Bayernが1206年4月7日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ケルヘイムで生まれた時，父Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayernは32歳，母Ludmilla von Böhmenは36歳であった。1222年5月にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチでAgnes von Braunschweigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1253年11月29日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ランドシュトで47歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンオバーバイエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto II von Bayern(이)가 1206년 4월 7일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 켈하임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ludmilla von Böhmen(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1222년 5월 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 Agnes von Braunschweig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 11월 29일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 랜드슈트에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 오버베이른에 묻혔다.

mn.7 April 1206–29 November 1253: 1206 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 7–1253 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 29

pt.7 April 1206–29 November 1253: 7 de abril de 1206–29 de novembro de 1253
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto II von Bayern nasceu em 7 de abril de 1206, em Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ludmilla von Böhmen, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes von Braunschweig em maio de 1222, em Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1253, em Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Alemanha, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto II von Bayern родился 7 апреля 1206 г. в местности ландкрис келхим, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ludmilla von Böhmen, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von Braunschweig май 1222 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 ноября 1253 г. в местности ландкрис ландшут, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности обирбеиирн, беиирн, Германия.

es.7 April 1206–29 November 1253: 7 de abril de 1206–29 de noviembre de 1253
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto II von Bayern nació el 7 de abril de 1206, en Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Ludwig I. Herzog von Bayern, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ludmilla von Böhmen, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Agnes von Braunschweig en mayo de 1222, en Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1253, en Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemania.
